zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alse Huntington是Sir Thomas de Huntington III和Margaret Tyrell的女儿，出生。她于1474年与Thomas Leete结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1506年2月3日在英国亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓。

nameMeanings.name: Huntington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places called Huntington, most of which are named with Old English huntena, the genitive plural form of hunta ‘hunter, huntsman’, + dūn ‘hill’ or tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Some, however, may have Old English hunting ‘hunting’ as the initial element, while others may derive from the Old English personal name Hunta (genitive Huntan), perhaps with Old English connective -ing-, + tūn. The surname may also arise from Huntingdon (Huntingdonshire), which derives from the Old English personal name Hunta (genitive Huntan) or Old English hunta (genitive huntan) + dūn.

History: A prominent American family of this name were founded by Simon Huntington, who himself never saw the New World, for he died in 1633 on the voyage to Boston, where his widow settled with her children. Their descendants include Jabez Huntington (1719–86), a wealthy West Indies trader, and Samuel Huntington (1731–96), who was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. Collis Potter Huntington (1821–1900) was an American railway magnate. Beginning with little education or money, he made a huge fortune, some of which he left to his nephew, Henry Huntington (1850–1927), who used the money to establish the Huntington library and art gallery in CA.

variants.name: Hunt
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name for a hunter, from Middle English hunte ‘hunter, huntsman’ (Old English hunta). The term was used not only of the hunting on horseback of game such as stags and wild boars, which in the Middle Ages was a pursuit restricted to the ranks of the nobility, but also to much humbler forms of pursuit such as bird catching and poaching for food. The word seems also to have been used as an Old English personal name and to have survived into the Middle Ages as an occasional personal name. Compare Huntington and Huntley .
Irish: adopted for various Irish surnames containing or thought to contain the Gaelic element fiadhach ‘hunt’; for example Ó Fiaich (see Fee ) and Ó Fiachna (see Fenton ).
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Hundt  .

nameMeanings.name: Alse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Alse Huntington was born as the daughter of Sir Thomas de Huntington III and Margaret Tyrell. She married Thomas Leete in 1474. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 3 February 1506, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Alse Huntington est née, fille de Sir Thomas de Huntington III et Margaret Tyrell. Elle a épousé Thomas Leete en 1474. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 3 février 1506, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Alse Huntington wurde, als Tochter von Sir Thomas de Huntington III und Margaret Tyrell geboren. Sie hat 1474 Thomas Leete geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 3. Februar 1506 in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Alse Huntington è nata il come figlia di Sir Thomas de Huntington III e Margaret Tyrell. Lei sposato Thomas Leete nel 1474. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 3 febbraio 1506, nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alse HuntingtonはSir Thomas de Huntington IIIとMargaret Tyrellの娘として生まれた。1474年にThomas Leeteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1506年2月3日にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alse Huntington(은)는 Sir Thomas de Huntington III(와)과 Margaret Tyrell의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1474년 Thomas Leete(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1506년 2월 3일 영국 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alse Huntington nasceu filha de Sir Thomas de Huntington III e Margaret Tyrell. Ela casou-se com Thomas Leete em 1474. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1506, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Alse Huntington родилась. Её родителей звали Sir Thomas de Huntington III и Margaret Tyrell. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Leete в 1474 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 3 февраля 1506 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Alse Huntington nació como hija de Sir Thomas de Huntington III y Margaret Tyrell. Se casó con Thomas Leete en 1474. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1506, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.
